mapper.select: SELECT readme AS "readme", present AS "present", present_treat AS "presentTreat", history AS "history", allergy AS "allergy", preliminary_diagnosis AS "preliminaryDiagnosis", diagnosis AS "diagnosis" FROM medical_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT chief_complaint AS "chiefComplaint", symptom_duration AS "symptomDuration", ai_summary AS "aiSummary", suggested_exam AS "suggestedExam" FROM ai_consultation_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT d.disease_name AS "diseaseName" FROM medical_record mr INNER JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id INNER JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY d.disease_name
